concerns: product.md is a task description placeholder, not a deliverable specification — contains zero actual feature specifications, acceptance criteria, or user stories
architecture.md is a task description placeholder, not a deliverable architecture document — contains zero actual design decisions, folder structure, or service boundaries
No MoSCoW prioritization exists to distinguish MVP from v2 features, blocking sprint planning and resource allocation
No acceptance criteria in Gherkin format (Given/When/Then) for any of the 17 required features, making it impossible for developers to estimate or QA to validate
No user stories or personas defined — missing 'as a [user], I want [goal], so that [benefit]' format across all features
Availability & Slot Computation data model is completely undefined — no recurrence rules, exception handling, resource allocation, or algorithm specification
Payment integration specification is entirely absent — no state machine, no Stripe vs offline payment flows, no PCI-DSS scope, no failure recovery
No API contracts defined between frontend and backend — REST vs GraphQL undecided, no request/response schemas, no error handling patterns
No data models or ERD for any feature — critical for Booking Flow, Payment, Reviews, and Provider Portal
Background Jobs (BullMQ) requirements are vague — no specific job types, retry policies, queue separation, or dead letter queue strategy
No notification matrix defined — push vs email vs SMS triggers, user preference controls, opt-out mechanisms missing
Provider Portal features not separated from consumer app — missing business hours CRUD, service catalog CRUD, staff/resource management, revenue dashboard specs
Admin Dashboard requirements undefined — no user management, business verification workflow, content moderation, platform analytics, commission configuration
No non-functional requirements specified — performance targets, security standards, accessibility (WCAG), offline support strategy missing
No edge cases documented — double-booking prevention, timezone handling, payment failure recovery, concurrent modification conflicts
No analytics events or success metrics defined for any feature — cannot measure product success or iterate
No localization/internationalization requirements — language support, currency handling, timezone display rules
No GDPR compliance, data retention policies, or PII handling specifications for EU users
No offline behavior and sync strategy for mobile app — what works without connectivity, conflict resolution for offline bookings
No competitor analysis or differentiation strategy for Planity Clone vs original Planity platform
suggestions: Deliver complete product.md with: feature list with MoSCoW prioritization, detailed user stories for each feature, acceptance criteria in Gherkin format, data models/ERD, API contract stubs, and error handling scenarios

Include specific payment flow specification — support both Stripe integration and offline/cash payment, with explicit state machine for payment status (pending, authorized, captured, failed, refunded, partially_refunded)
Define notification matrix: push vs email vs SMS, triggered by which events, with user preference controls, frequency caps, and opt-out mechanisms compliant with CAN-SPAM/GDPR

Specify Provider Portal features separately from consumer app — business hours management, service catalog CRUD, staff/resource management, booking calendar view with drag-and-drop, revenue dashboard, payout schedule

Detail Admin Dashboard requirements: user management with suspension/verification, business verification workflow with document upload, content moderation for reviews with appeal process, platform analytics with cohort retention, commission/fee configuration with A/B test support
Add explicit security requirements: GDPR compliance for EU users, PCI-DSS scope for payments, data retention policies, PII handling, encryption at rest and in transit, audit logging
Define offline behavior and sync strategy for mobile app — cached business data, queued booking requests, conflict resolution for bookings made offline, sync status indicators

Include localization and internationalization requirements — supported languages (FR, EN, ES, DE), currency handling with exchange rate service, timezone display rules with user preference vs business timezone
Specify accessibility requirements: WCAG 2.1 AA, screen reader support, minimum 44dp touch targets, color contrast 4.5:1, reduced motion support
Add explicit success metrics and analytics events for each feature: conversion funnel, booking completion rate, provider activation rate, NPS, churn rate, revenue per booking

Design Availability & Slot Computation as dedicated bounded context with RFC 5545/iCalendar-based recurrence, exception handling (overrides, cancellations), resource allocation model with staff-skills-to-services mapping
Create explicit API contract using OpenAPI 3.0 with type-safe code generation for TypeScript, including pagination patterns, rate limit headers, and standardized error response envelope
blockers: Must produce actual product.md with complete feature specifications — current placeholder is unusable for implementation, QA, or code review
Must define acceptance criteria in Gherkin format for all 17 features — without this, 'done' is undefined and sprint planning is impossible
Must create Availability & Slot Computation data model and algorithm specification — this blocks booking flow, provider portal, and payment integration entirely
Must specify payment integration with complete state machine and failure recovery — high-risk feature with legal/regulatory implications that cannot be retrofitted
Must define API contracts between frontend and backend — without this, parallel development is impossible and integration will fail
Must produce actual architecture.md with complete system design — current placeholder is unusable for implementation
Must create monorepo folder structure scaffold — developers cannot start without knowing where code lives
Must define authentication and authorization architecture — security-critical and blocks all protected routes

concerns: The product.md and architecture.md are still task descriptions, not actual deliverable specifications. I have no actionable requirements to implement.
No API contracts (OpenAPI, tRPC, or GraphQL) are defined. I cannot build backend endpoints without knowing request/response schemas, error codes, or pagination patterns.
No Prisma schema or database model is provided. I cannot scaffold migrations or write repository code without entity definitions.
No service boundaries or module decomposition is specified for the NestJS backend. I don't know which features belong in which module or how they communicate.
No authentication/authorization architecture is defined (JWT, OAuth2, RBAC roles). This blocks all protected routes including user profile, bookings, provider portal, and admin dashboard.
No caching strategy for Redis is designed. I need to know what to cache (slots, business search results, session tokens) and invalidation rules.
No background job specifications for BullMQ. I don't know what job types exist (email sending, slot recomputation, payment confirmation), retry policies, or queue separation.
No error handling or logging strategy is documented. I need consistent error response formats and structured logging patterns.
No rate limiting or security middleware requirements are specified. This is critical for a public API.
No test strategy is defined. I need to know expected test coverage, testing frameworks, and CI integration for backend tests.
suggestions: Provide a complete Prisma schema covering all 17 features, including PostGIS geometry fields for business locations, full-text search indexes, and proper relations (User, Business, Service, Appointment, Review, Payment, Notification, etc.).
Define RESTful API endpoints with request/response DTOs for each feature. Use NestJS decorators and OpenAPI annotations to generate swagger docs.
Specify the authentication flow: JWT access + refresh tokens, OAuth2 social login providers (Google, Apple), and role-based access control (customer, provider, admin).
Design the Availability & Slot Computation algorithm as a dedicated NestJS module with clear input/output contracts, recurrence rule parsing (RRULE), and timezone-aware slot generation.
Define BullMQ queue names, job payloads, and worker logic for: email notifications, push notifications, slot cache warming, payment webhook processing, and review moderation.
Specify Redis usage: session store, rate limiter (sliding window), slot computation cache (TTL-based), and pub/sub for real-time booking updates.
Define a consistent error response format (e.g., { statusCode, message, error, timestamp, path }) and NestJS exception filters for validation, auth, and business logic errors.
Provide a test plan: unit tests for services, integration tests for controllers with test containers (PostgreSQL + Redis), and e2e tests for critical flows (booking, payment).
Document environment variables, Docker Compose setup for local development, and CI pipeline steps for running backend tests and linting.
Specify file upload strategy for business images and user avatars (Supabase Storage or S3), including signed URLs and image validation.
